# SellerBuddy

> AI-powered Amazon advertising automation SaaS for sellers, brands, and agencies.

## About

SellerBuddy is an AI-powered platform that automates Amazon advertising for sellers, brands, and agencies. It simplifies campaign management, bid optimization, and keyword targeting so Amazon sellers can focus on growing their business.

## Website

- Homepage: https://sellerbuddy.app/
- Blog: https://sellerbuddy.app/blog

## Key Features

- Automated Amazon PPC campaign management
- AI-driven bid optimization
- Smart keyword targeting and research
- Performance analytics and reporting
- Multi-account and agency support

## Target Audience

- Amazon sellers looking to automate advertising
- E-commerce brands scaling on Amazon
- Agencies managing multiple Amazon seller accounts

## Pages

- / — Landing page with features, pricing, testimonials, and onboarding steps
- /blog — Blog listing with SEO-optimized articles on Amazon advertising
- /blog/:id — Individual blog posts

## API

- GET /api/v1/landing-page — Landing page content (hero, features, pricing, testimonials)
- GET /api/v1/blogs — All published blog posts
- GET /api/v1/blog/{id} — Single blog post with SEO metadata

## Contact

- Website: https://sellerbuddy.app
